incidents.justification: Presenting false data with confidence = hallucination. This shows how unreliable the model is.
This is clearly a privacy violation. No debate needed. They broke a very explicit law.
Safety issue with the use of video generation AI, compromising the safety of the company
Bis during training led to a lack of fairness towards female candidates
There was a bias that was developed within the system that wasn't discovered due to human oversight
This was misinformation spread that lead to a security breach

stretch_notes: OpenAI revealed in 2024 that conversations with ChatGPT were stored and evaluated to filter harmful content and aid in model training. This is a clear violation of privacy laws
